GeneDef.label: budding
GeneDef.description: Carriers of this gene can carry children in cancerous fleshmass buds on their bodies.

customEffectDescriptions.li: Turns <color=#8a8ae6>pregnancy</color> into cancer <color=#8a8ae6>bud</color> 3 days after it starts.
Each subsequent pregnancy increases the <color=#8a8ae6>litter</color> size for max 5.
<color=#8a8ae6>Geneset</color> of a bud is determined by the <color=#8a8ae6>first pregnancy</color> and does not change until <color=#8a8ae6>hatching</color>.

HediffDef.label: cancer bud
HediffDef.description: A large, fleshmass cancerous tumor on the carrier's body. At some point, it will develop into a baby, but for now, it only causes pain.
